title: gladiolus longiflorus
intro: Gladiolus longiflorus, also known as the Kuan Yin or Chinese Gladiolus, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the Iridaceae family and is native to China. The plant has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antiviral properties. Gladiolus longiflorus is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating respiratory issues, including bronchitis and asthma. Herbal preparations of Gladiolus longiflorus include infusions, decoctions, and powders, which can be used to treat various health conditions.
